name: peak-workflow
description: Requirements-driven development workflow in the spirit of DO-330 TQL-5. Formal Gherkin-style TOR requirements (TOR-NN-XXXXXXX) serve as the single source of truth — epics implement requirements, tests are derived from Given/When/Then, and wrapup verifies against the requirements baseline rather than prose acceptance criteria. Covers the full lifecycle: discovery, requirements capture, planning, implementation, requirements-based verification, and documentation refresh.
